violations.text: The bar upstairs and downstairs is lacking a hand-washing sink. Establishment is to place hand sinks at bars. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the downstairs bar. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025
